title: DAYTIME WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: ABUNDANT LIFE CENTER DAYTIME WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a daytime warming center for people without power or heat. Coffee is available. 1154 NW A Street Toledo, OR 97391 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Open Thursday, December 18, 2025 2pm-8pm and Friday, December 19, 2025 7am-6pm Email (541) 336-2339 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 336-2239 Main phone Main phone (541) 336-2339 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
